seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Surat Thani 2026 — Budget, Mid-Range & Riverside Stays
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Surat Thani for every budget. From budget guesthouses near Talad Kaset to mid-range riverside hotels and the best options near Donsak Pier. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Surat Thani's hotel scene divides naturally by purpose: travelers transiting to the islands want to be near Talad Kaset (the bus-ferry hub) for easy morning departures; those exploring the city want the riverside area for atmosphere and food; those visiting Khao Sok or arriving by train need options near Phun Phin station. Most stays are one or two nights — so location, ease of transport connections, and value matter more than luxury amenities. Here are 10 hotels that deliver on what Surat Thani travelers actually need.

hotels.name: Sleep Box Hostel Suratthani
hotels.description: The most popular budget option in Surat Thani, designed specifically for transit travelers who need a clean, central bed near the bus-ferry hub. Modern dorm pods with privacy curtains, individual reading lights, USB charging ports, and lockers. The location a few minutes' walk from Talad Kaset makes it ideal for early ferry departures — staff are well-versed in booking onward transport.
highlights: Walking distance to Talad Kaset bus-ferry hub
Modern pod-style dorms with privacy and USB charging
Knowledgeable staff for onward island connections

hotels.name: Rajthani Hotel
hotels.description: A well-run mid-budget hotel in central Surat Thani with consistently high reviews for cleanliness and value. Air-conditioned rooms with hot showers, complimentary WiFi, and free self-parking. Not fancy, but reliable — the kind of place where everything works and staff are helpful with travel arrangements. Walking distance to the main markets, riverside, and transport offices.
highlights: Consistent 8.6 review score for value and cleanliness
Free WiFi and self-parking
Central location within walking distance of markets and Tapi River

hotels.name: S.22 Hotel Suratthani
hotels.description: A modern budget hotel that stands out for including free breakfast — unusual at this price point in Surat Thani. Rooms are clean and functional with reliable air conditioning and good WiFi. The breakfast buffet is basic but useful for travelers with early ferry departures. Central location within easy walking distance of the Saturday Night Market and Tapi River.
highlights: Free breakfast included — valuable for early departure days
Modern, clean rooms at budget prices
Central location near markets and transport connections

hotels.name: 100 Islands Resort & Spa
hotels.description: A surprising find at the budget end — a resort property with swimming pool, spa, and complimentary buffet breakfast at a price point that undercuts most Bangkok budget hotels. The name references the 100 islands dotting the bay visible from Surat Thani's coast. Rooms are comfortable and well-maintained. The pool is the key differentiator at this price, making it a good choice for longer stays.
highlights: Swimming pool — rare and valuable at this price in Surat Thani
Complimentary breakfast buffet included
Spa facilities at budget rates

hotels.name: Baan Suan Resort
hotels.description: A pleasant mid-range resort set in tropical gardens on the outskirts of Surat Thani city. Wooden bungalows and garden rooms surrounded by fruit trees and plants — a much more atmospheric setting than the city-center concrete hotels. The resort has a swimming pool, restaurant, and a genuinely relaxed garden ambience that makes it feel further from the city than it actually is.
highlights: Tropical garden setting with bungalow-style accommodation
Swimming pool in peaceful green surroundings
Good on-site restaurant serving Thai food
bestFor: those wanting to decompress after island travel

hotels.name: Muang Thong Hotel
hotels.description: One of the more established mid-range options in Surat Thani city center, popular with business travelers and Thai visitors. Standard rooms are spacious and well-equipped with minibar, air conditioning, and reliable WiFi. The central location makes it one of the most convenient for exploring the city on foot — the Saturday Night Market, Tapi River, and Talad Kaset are all within 15 minutes' walk.
highlights: Central location ideal for city exploration
Spacious rooms with minibar and reliable WiFi
Walking distance to Saturday Night Market and Tapi River waterfront

hotels.name: Chomsurang Hotel
hotels.description: A long-established hotel in the heart of Surat Thani, well-known to the traveler community as a reliable mid-range choice with genuinely helpful staff. The rooftop restaurant offers views over the city and decent Thai-Chinese food. Rooms are clean and functional. The hotel has its own travel desk for arranging ferry tickets, Khao Sok tours, and onward transport — particularly useful for travelers without smartphones or data plans.
highlights: Rooftop restaurant with city views
In-house travel desk for transport and tours
Longstanding reputation for helpful, English-speaking staff

hotels.name: WanderInn Surat Thani
hotels.description: A modern boutique guesthouse that has built an excellent reputation among backpackers and independent travelers for its clean rooms, comfortable beds, and genuinely knowledgeable staff. The team specializes in helping guests navigate the Surat Thani transport system — from train to ferry connections, Khao Sok day trips, and bus booking. Common areas are social and inviting.
highlights: Expert staff for island and Khao Sok connections
Modern rooms with quality beds — better than the price suggests
Social common area ideal for meeting fellow travelers

hotels.name: Maneerote Hotel
hotels.description: One of Surat Thani's better mid-range options with a riverside location near Tapee Pier — the most atmospheric setting in the city. Spacious rooms with balconies offering Tapi River views, a rooftop pool, and a restaurant serving Thai and seafood. The river views at sunset from the upper floors are genuinely beautiful. A step above the standard transit hotel — worth the extra 500-800 THB for the setting.
highlights: Riverside location near Tapee Pier with Tapi River views
Rooftop swimming pool
Restaurant with Thai seafood and river atmosphere
bestFor: those with more than one night in Surat Thani

hotels.name: Nadpob Hotel (Phun Phin)
hotels.description: The best option for travelers arriving late by train or departing early — located directly in front of Phun Phin train station, 14 km from the city center. Basic but clean rooms at low prices, with a 24-hour reception that accommodates late train arrivals. Not a destination hotel — purely functional for train-transit travelers who don't want to add a 40-minute red bus ride into the city at odd hours.
highlights: Directly in front of Phun Phin railway station — zero transit hassle
24-hour reception for late/early train arrivals
Cheapest option for travelers using the overnight train service

bookingTips: Book accommodation near Talad Kaset if your main goal is connecting to the islands — all bus-ferry operators are concentrated here
For the railway station (Phun Phin), Nadpob Hotel right outside is the smartest late-arrival option — skip the 40-minute red bus into the city
Surat Thani has very few luxury hotels in the city itself — for a luxury experience in the province, Koh Samui has world-class resorts
During the Chak Phra Festival (October), all city-center hotels sell out — book 3-4 weeks ahead
Most hotels in Surat Thani will store your luggage for free during day trips to Khao Sok — worth confirming at check-in
Low season (May-Oct) discounts of 20-30% are common at mid-range hotels — the city is a year-round destination unaffected by island weather patterns
